name: useMap
description: Hook that manages a map structure
examples: const { value, set, remove, clear, reset, size, has } = useMap([1, 'one'], [2, 'two']);

parameters.name: values
parameters.description: The initial array of the map

source.source: * @param {Value[]} [values] The initial array of the map

tokens.name: [values]
tokens.description: The initial array of the map

returns.name: An
returns.description: object containing the current map and functions to interact with the map
